title: AEROANGEL - 211info
text: AEROANGEL AEROANGEL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides flights to distant medical care. Requests are ideally scheduled three weeks in advance although exceptions can be made for urgent situations. Flights are determined on a case-by-case basis. 1550 Larimer Street Suite 899 Denver, CO 80202 Eligibility: -Individuals age 18 and younger who are medically fragile -Flights are also considered for young adults who have been dealing with health challenges since childhood. -Passengers must be able to climb steps to board the aircraft, be medically stable, and able to sit upright or slightly reclined for the duration of the flight. Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-5pm Email (303) 817-7355 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (303) 817-7355 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for urgent requests FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Recent photo of the child and letter of medical necessity. Additional passengers must have a valid form of identification such as a passport or driver's license. AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Mercy Transportation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AEROANGEL
